short_summary: Iran deal uncertain, Tren de Aragua strike
rationale: US-Iran deal remains the dominant story with real policy and market implications; Tren de Aragua leader killing continues established airstrike pattern with minor domestic security resonance.

top_events.title: Trump claims US-Iran deal Sunday signing; Tehran disputes; Israel strikes Beirut
top_events.summary: Conflicting signals on Iran deal keep oil markets and US foreign policy in flux; Israeli strikes on Beirut the same day complicate the diplomatic picture and raise risk of broader escalation involving US interests.

top_events.title: US kills leader of Venezuela's Tren de Aragua gang in air strike
top_events.summary: US airstrike eliminates Tren de Aragua leader — continuation of established pattern; minor domestic security and political resonance for US residents.

top_events.title: Anthropic suspends new AI tools over US government security concerns
top_events.summary: Federal government security review continues to restrict Anthropic AI tools — ongoing policy story with limited direct daily impact for most Americans.
